name: compliance closed-loop step provenance-to-manifest writes the controls_consulted block into the AI provenance manifest
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-test.sh" --step provenance-to-manifest --commit abc123 --controls-consulted GV.OC --frameworks nist-csf-2 --provenance-out .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"controls_consulted":\["GV.OC"\]' .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json && echo ok 1>&2
